resources.string: API usage is significantly cheaper than fixed subscription. API-key authentication is safer than username/password authentication and API access allow you to use different API providers. App can access only API but not account info. You can revoke API key anytime without losing your account. API key is encrypted and stored only on your device.

Enter the key only if you downloaded this app from official Store or Github page or compiled from sources. We are not responsible for apps from third-party sources. Builds from third-party sources may be insecure.
Generation of hateful, harassing, or violent content
Note: Sending multiple identical reports will not solve your problem faster.
Tap to manage your API account
Set a language for voice output
Note: All images are squared. Higher resolution is more expensive and it loads slower. You can see prices on the official OpenAI page. Average price is $0.018/image.
Note: Some ROMs may not support speech recognition by Google. Whisper API is a paid API by OpenAI that requires Internet.
Tap to see app and developer info

SpeakGPT is an open-source client that allow you to use different LLMs including OpenAI ChatGPT, Facebook LLama. We (developer) are not affiliated with OpenAI or other API providers. All logos and materials are property of respective companies.
We are not responsible for assistant output. As an AI language model SpeakGPT may occasionally provide incorrect, irrelevant or offensive information.

Your chat history is saved locally but you can turn on Teslasoft ID sync. In this case your chat history will be saved on our servers for backup purposes. No data is transferred to third-party companies.
Pro tip: You can edit prompt before trying it.
SpeakGPT is an advanced and highly intuitive voice assistant that utilizes the powerful LLMs to provide you with unparalleled performance and functionality.

Note: This prompt will be sent on the start of each conversation. Please note that this feature may use additional tokens. Leave this blank empty to disable this feature. If it is not work just clear your chat history.
WARNING: We recommend to set max_tokens parameter for classifiers to avoid useless usage. Lower value will make generating process faster but may cut off output.

Some models work best if end separator is set. We recommend using \"\\n\\n###\\n\\n\" separator. It may depend on training dataset. For more info refer model\'s documentation or (if possible) inspect training data.
Something is wrong in your connection. Our servers might be unavailable or you don\'t have Internet connection.
Follow OpenAI safety principles. Do not post any inappropriate or sensitive information. All prompts are being moderated. Inappropriate prompts will be removed without further notice.
Start your message with \"Create an image\", \"Create a photo\" or \"/imagine\" to generate images.
Long press chat name to edit or delete it.

Search tricks:

Use "author:" prefix to search by author.
Use "title:" prefix to search by title.
Use "id:" prefix to search by id.
Use "cat:" prefix to search y category.
Use "type:" prefix to search by type.
ChatGPT is stuffy? Try out other models. Sometimes you may get very interesting results.
Only GPT models can remember previous messages. Other models are not optimized for it.
Sometimes some weird or useless features may appear. It because this app is in beta test.

Select text in any app and tap \"SpeakGPT\" to start conversation with assistant. This feature is available even if default assistant app feature is off. Also you can share text with SpeakGPT using default share option if SpeakGPT option is not available.
You can save your conversation with assistant. Once save button is clicked all future messages will also be saved.
SpeakGPT is too slow? Try to reduce max tokens per output.

Voice input by Google may not be supported on all devices (especially devices with no Google Services). You can switch to Whisper model in this case. Please note that Whisper is a paid API and it requires Internet connection.
The chat could not be renamed safely, so nothing was changed. The chat, its messages and its settings are all untouched under the old name. You can try again.
To use this software you need to provide API host and APi key. SpeakGPT uses different AI APIs including OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Azure.
Set if you want to use other LLMs or OpenAI is banned in your country
Set TTS Language From Chat Response
What do you want to do with this text?
Putting a system message at the start of conversation can improve answers quality and avoid \"forgetting\" information.
Objection sent. Thank you for feedback!
Long press stop recording button to cancel speech recognition and prevent generating response.

You are editing global settings. This is a template for new chats and settings for assistant. These settings don\'t apply to existing chats. To edit settings for existing chat, open the chat and click the settings icon.
Long press on setting tile to show function description. Works only on new settings UI. You can access new settings UI (Settings) by pressing on the \'lab\' icon in the regular settings.
Check the lorebooks to use in this chat
No additional lorebooks are linked to this Companion yet. Link them from the Companion\'s edit screen.
No lorebooks yet. Create them under Characters → Lorebooks.
One word or phrase describing the kind of book, e.g. Characters, World, Plot. Used for filtering.
Always active while this Companion is used. Optional.
Automatically enable the last-used lorebooks in new chats
Manage memory collections for role-play and context
Delete this lorebook and all of its memories? This cannot be undone.
A name for this collection, e.g. a campaign or project.
Are you sure you want to delete this memory?
A friendly name to recognize this memory.
This text is injected into the prompt when a trigger matches.
One trigger per line. Matches whole words, including simple variants (dragon also matches dragons). Wrap a trigger in \"quotes\" to require that exact text.
The raw text this memory came from. Kept for later use.
Name and content cannot be empty.
No memories have been injected yet. Create a memory with a trigger, then send a message containing that trigger.
Are you sure you want to delete this Companion? This action cannot be undone.
The profile and all associated memories that aren\'t shared with another companion will be permanently deleted.
Sent before your system message at the start of every request.
Please create a new companion to begin a chat.

SpeakGPT does not collect these info, but depending on API provider used (like OpenAI, OpenRouter, etc) some of these data may be saved by these providers. When you chat with SpeakGPT, we transfer your conversation directly to API provider and do not save it on our servers. Please review Privacy Policy of API provider you are using to learn more about how your data is processed.
• Device info (device model, Android version, etc)

This info is used for analytics and marketing purposes. We do not share this info with third-party organizations. This info is collected only when \"Usage and diagnostics\" feature is enabled. You can also send this info manually. You are able to delete this info from our servers, reset or/and delete installation ID. You can also revoke authorization to use this data without losing access to the app.

This data is required for function \"Prompts store\". We do not collect this data unless you published a prompt. You can still delete this data by reporting a prompt or contacting us via admin@teslasoft.org. This data is stored permanently unless you request your data to be deleted. This data can be accessed by other users.

* When you install this app an installation ID will be created. This id is a random UUID string and it does not belong to Android id or any of hardware IDs. You can either reset or delete installation ID. In this case we will stop to collect data associated with installation ID.

** User-generated content is all content created and published by users using this app. We may review public content for violations and remove inappropriate content. We don\'t have access to private content (like chats list, conversations, etc)
This page describes which data we use and why.
Even if you decompile the app and remove this screen we may still collect this data. By using this app, you are agree with our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

Your donation has been verified. Donations and ads help us to keep this app up to date, provide you with high-quality experience and release new features. Now you can enjoy ad free experience! This license is lifetime. If you want to activate the license on another device, please contact us.

IMPORTANT NOTE:\nIf you still see ads you might need to restart the app. Please note that if you used installation ID to activate the license, ads may appear once you reinstall the app. Please contact us for a new license or use Android ID to activate license in this case. Android ID is unique for each app and it is persistent until you perform a factory reset. Installation ID is temporary and it changes after app reinstall or and when you manually reset it/revoke authorization.
Path added to the Base URL, e.g. /chat/completions. Most OpenAI-compatible providers use this default.
How your API key is sent. Bearer works for OpenAI, GLM/z.ai, OpenRouter and Groq.
Tap to choose from models available on this endpoint.
Timeouts cannot be less than 5 seconds
Timeouts cannot be more than 300 seconds
Timeouts cannot be less than 45 seconds
Delete profile? This can\'t be undone.
No active profile to save to
Leave API key field blank if you don\'t want to change API key.

This data is provided for informational purposes only. Cost is calculated based on your model and text only messages. Additional charges may occurr for processing/generating images. We added this card to help users understand their usage and how does the cost is calculated.

Changes are saved automatically. Usually you don\'t need to alter temperature, top_p, frequency penalty, presence penalty and seed params. But if you need to do so you can. Please note that it\'s not recommended to change both temperature and top_p params as you may receive unexpected results. The default temperature is 0.7, default top_p is 1.0 and default values for penalties are 0.0.
Please note that DALL-E 3 supports only 1024x1024 images. If you select another resolution with DALL-E 3 you will receive an error.
Default API endpoint label cannot be edited
Default API endpoint cannot be deleted
At least 1 API endpoint must be set
Logit bias must be in range from -100 to 100
Please fill token or token ID field

Logit Bias Config is a feature that allows you to set custom logit bias for specific tokens. Logit bias is a value that is added to the logit of the token. It can be used to increase or decrease the probability of the token in the output sequence. For example, if you set logit bias to 100, the token will be more likely to appear in the output sequence. If you set logit bias to -100, the token will be less likely to appear in the output sequence.
Are you sure you want to clear this log?
Error, no model name is provided
This feature allows you to manage your OpenAI account.
Create and switch between API connection profiles. Each profile holds a base URL, API key, chat completions endpoint and auth mode.
Create and switch between companions. A companion is a reusable prompt (persona) merged ahead of your system message, and it carries its own long-term memory. Companions are shared across all chats.
Companions, activation prompts and your system message — all in one place.
Reusable opening messages. Create several, give each a title, and attach one to a Companion.
Are you sure you want to delete this activation prompt? This action cannot be undone.
Sent as the first user message when this activation is applied.
The activation prompt to use with this Companion. None is always available.
This feature allows you to set your API endpoint.
This feature allows you to enable or disable messages auto send. When auto send is enabled, SpeakGPT will automatically send messages without pressing \'Send\' button once listening is finished.
This feature allows you to set your TTS voice.
This feature allows you to set your TTS voice language.
This feature allows you to set image generation model.
This feature allows you to set image resolution. Please note that DALL-e 3 supports only 1024x1024.
This feature allows you to set TTS engine. OpenAI TTS is paid.
This feature allows you to set STT engine. Whisper is paid.
Choose how speech is transcribed: Google dictation, OpenAI Whisper (paid cloud), or on-device Whisper (private, free, downloads a model).
No models downloaded yet. Tap a model on the previous screen to download it.
Pick a model below to download. The download is one-time and stays on your phone until you delete it.
%1$s will be removed from your phone. You can download it again later.
On-device Whisper isn\'t connected yet — using cloud Whisper for this transcription.
No on-device Whisper model installed yet — using cloud Whisper for this transcription.
Could not open the microphone for on-device Whisper. Try again or check permissions.
Hands-free: VAD grace period prevents TTS speaker bleed from triggering false speech; hard fallback watchdog for silent TTS failures; accurate pause timing
This feature allows you let SpeakGPT never pronounce answers.
This feature allows you let SpeakGPT always pronounce answers.
After the assistant speaks, the microphone reopens automatically so you can reply without tapping. Uses Google speech recognition and spoken (auto-send) replies. Long-press the mic to stop.
Set how many seconds the mic tolerates a pause while you think, and how long it waits for you to start talking.
How hands-free decides you\'ve stopped talking (on-device Whisper only).
WebRTC voice detection isn\'t available on this device, so Energy will be used instead. Switch to Energy to avoid this.
Shown while a hands-free conversation is active so the system keeps the mic open with the screen off.
Tap to return to the chat
Shown while a response is being generated so the connection survives the screen turning off or switching to another app.
Tap to return to the chat
This feature allows you to set text generation model as well as model\'s params.
This feature allows you to set activation prompt which will be sent as a first user message.
Global instructions appended to every chat. Shared across all characters.
No system prompts yet. Tap Add System Prompt to create one.
This system prompt will be permanently removed.
This feature allows you to enable automatic language detection of speech.
Classic layout is a chat layout like on the official ChatGPT website.
This feature allows you to enable slash commands. Please note that this feature is experimental and unstable. Example: /imagine a cat.

This feature allows you to enable desktop mode. When desktop mode is enabled, SpeakGPT will use keyboard shortcuts and message input will be automatically focused. Press \'Enter\' to send message, \'Shift + Enter\' to add new line and \'Shift+Esc\' to close chat. Not recommended to use on phones unless you want keyboard to be opened every time you open the chat.
This feature allows you to enable new experimental UI. New UI is more compact and intuitive.
This feature allows you to open about SpeakGPT page.
This feature allows you to clear chat history.
This feature allows you to open SpeakGPT documentation.
This feature allows you to enable AMOLED mode for supported displays. It can significantly save battery. AMOLED mode is only available in dark theme.
This feature allows you change assistant\'s name and avatar for individual chat or globally.
This feature allows you to view crash log.
This feature allows you to view event log. We do not collect this log as it may contain sensitive information. Use this log if you want to report a bug.
This feature allows you to enable auto-save chats in assistant window. When auto-save chats is enabled, SpeakGPT will save all chats to the device storage.
Show error messages directly in the chat when a request fails, instead of failing silently.

Play a short descending tone when a response fails (for example when the model is overloaded or the connection drops), so you know a reply is not coming even when you are not looking at the screen. Uses the alarm volume, so it is still audible when the phone is on silent.
Choose diagnostic settings and review logs.
Choose how model errors are surfaced in chat, toggle the error alert sound, jump to Audio Debugging for anything microphone/voice related, and open the crash and event logs.
Settings for non-audio problems — model errors and alert sounds — plus the diagnostic logs. Anything to do with the microphone, voice detection, or transcription lives in Audio Debugging.
Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
Your prompt contains inappropriate content and be processed. We strive to make AI safe and relevant for everyone.
You are currently offline. Please check your connection and try again.

Your API key is incorrect. Change it in Settings > Change OpenAI key. If you think this is an error please check if your API key has not been rotated. If you accidentally published your key it might be automatically revoked.
An error occurred while generating response. It may be due to a weak connection or high demand. Try again later.
You exceeded your current quota. If you had free trial usage please add payment info. Also please check your usage limits. You can change your limits in Account settings.

Looks like this model (%s) is not available to you right now. It can be because of high demand or this model is currently in limited beta. If you are using a fine-tuned model, please make sure you entered correct model name.
Could not connect to the server. It may happen when your Internet speed is slow or too many users are using this model at the same time. Try to switch to another model.
Too many tokens. It is an internal error, please report it. Also try to truncate your input. Sometimes it may help.
No valid model is set in settings. Please change the model and try again.
An error has been occurred during generation. See the error details below:
Reply interrupted and may be incomplete.
Reply stopped and may be incomplete.
Reply failed and may be incomplete.
Reply status is unknown and may be incomplete.
[System note: The previous assistant reply was interrupted and may be incomplete.]
The connection closed before the response finished. Try again, or switch models if this only happens with one model.

Connection Timed Out: The app could not establish a connection to the server within the connection timeout. This usually points to a slow or unstable network rather than the model. Try again, or raise the connection timeout for this endpoint.
The app could not reach the server address. Check your connection or the Base URL, then try again.

Response Timed Out: The connection succeeded, but the server did not send a response within the response time. The model may be busy or slow to reply. Try again, switch models, or raise the response time for this endpoint.
The API key was rejected. Update the key in Settings.
No model is set for this chat. Choose a model in this chat\'s settings.
The selected model is not available on this endpoint. Check the model name in this chat\'s settings, or choose another.
The conversation is too long for this model\'s limit. Start a new chat or shorten the input.
The account\'s quota or usage limit has been reached. Check the account\'s billing and usage limits.
The endpoint was not found (HTTP 404). Check the Base URL in this profile\'s settings.
The server returned a response the app could not read as a stream. Check whether this endpoint and model support streaming.
The request was rejected as inappropriate content and could not be processed.
An unexpected error occurred. The technical details were saved to the Error Log.

SpeakGPT allows you to interact with ChatGPT Vision using your photos taken directly from camera in this app. To enable camera for GPT Vision please allow us to use your camera. You can still pick your existing pictures from gallery without camera permission. Allow camera access?
SpeakGPT allows you to interact with ChatGPT via voice activation. To enable voice activation please allow this app to use your device microphone. Allow microphone access?
You cannot use this feature because app do not have camera access.
You cannot use this feature because app do not have microphone access.
An error is occurred while analyzing file. The file might be corrupted or invalid.
Server error. Please try again later.
Failed to post prompt. Please check your Internet connection.
API endpoint has changed to support this model.
"An error occurred while fetching models. Please check your Internet and API key and try again later. Error message: "
An error occurred while fetching models. Please check your Internet and API key and try again later.
Are you sure you want to delete this API endpoint?
API endpoint must be a valid http:// or https:// URL
http:// — traffic to this endpoint is not encrypted

This endpoint uses plain http://. Your API key and every message you send (including voice transcripts) will travel unencrypted and can be read or altered by anyone on the same network.\n\nOnly continue if this is a local or trusted LAN server.
Are you sure you want to delete this config?
Are you sure you want to delete this message?
Cost: Error calculating cost. Please check your connection.
Cost: <SpeakGPT hasn\'t enough data to calculate cost for this model. Look for documentation and calculate cost manually based on the usage above.>

WARNING! Shitposting like random sequence of characters or words is not allowed. Please fill title and description properly so other people can understand what your prompt is about. Additionally, search algorithm indexes description and title. All prompts with unusual names will be either renamed or removed without notice. Thanks for understanding.\n\nFaithfully, App Developer!

SpeakGPT does not collect these info, but depending on API provider used (like OpenAI, OpenRouter, etc) some of these data may be saved by these providers. When you chat with SpeakGPT, we transfer your conversation directly to API provider and do not save it on our servers. All data saved locally is secured with a military-grade encryption (AES-256-GCM). Please review Privacy Policy of API provider you are using to learn more about how your data is processed.

Don\'t confuse the description with a prompt. Description is a short information about the prompt that will be displayed in the search results. Prompt description should not be long and will be cut into 3 lines.
The contents of the prompt field above will be actually sent to the AI. PS: Added this warning after many users confused description and prompt fields. It is not the same things.

And the last warning. By publishing something like \"Generate a song with offensive words\" you are creating the problems only for you but not for the app developer. Most of AI models will not accept such deceptive prompts. Auto-moderation is being implemented soon. Abusing prompt library system is a subject of banning you from the further prompt publishing. Additionally, please do not publish any personal information as your prompts and other content may pass human review to ensure it is safe and follows the Safety Guidelines.
Your prompt contains spam or has already been published. Publishing identical prompts is not allowed. Please review the prompt and try again.

Your prompt contains inappropriate content. Posting prompts that contains (but not limited to) hate speech, violence, sexual content, child harassment, jailbreaks, or any other form of inappropriate content is strictly prohibited. Please review the prompt and try again.

You have violated the Terms of Service multiple times and have been banned from posting prompts. If you think this is a mistake, please contact the app developer. Although, we don\'t know anything about you, don\'t try to bypass this ban by reinstalling the app or using the app on the other device. Internet sees everything :)
You need to update the app to the latest version to post prompts. It is security requirement to prevent abuse of our systems.
Some mandatory fields are not filled or your prompt contains invalid characters.

The API key is invalid. Is this app modified? Or compiled from the original sources? This is the client-side error that will likely occur only when you compile the app from the source and change something wrongly. If you sure that all info is correct, please report that error.

Please read this carefully before using this app. In case you haven't read app description, we would like to notice you that this app is the OPEN-SOURCE CLIENT for AI APIs. You will not find GPT or Gemini for free here. This app is just a convenient tool you can access your AI models through. THIS APP IS PROVIDED AS IS WITH NO WARRANTY UNDER LICENSE APACHE 2.0. By using this app you are agreeing that all your question about free usage will be rejected with no answer. Although some free APIs exists so you can use it with this app.

"Free cheese could be only in a mousetrap so you cannot use work of someone else for free making no effort and giving no credit. It is unethical."

P.S This disclaimer has been put here after some of users reported that SpeakGPT does not contain free access to flagship ChatGPT models.
SpeakGPT is an advanced and highly intuitive open-source assistant that uses the powerful LLMs. You can use online models like ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, or your local models with this app.
Settings related to transcription and text to speech.
Everything related to speech in one place: text-to-speech voice and engine, speech-to-text (dictation) engine, hands-free mode, voice-activity detection, and audio feedback. Tap to open.

Play a short, pleasant ascending tone once your speech has been transcribed, so you know dictation finished and a reply is on the way without watching the screen. Uses the alarm volume, so it stays audible even when the phone is on silent.

Record voice diagnostics: every hands-free decision (mic opened/closed and why, readback, failures) goes to the Event log in Settings, plus detailed Energy VAD state (RMS, noise floor, timing) to logcat. Turn off when not debugging.

Record voice diagnostics: every hands-free decision (mic opened/closed and why, readback, failures) goes to the Event log in Settings, plus detailed WebRTC VAD state (RMS, voiced frames, timing) to logcat. Turn off when not debugging.

When on, records microphone input health for each hands-free turn: frames received, average/max RMS and peak levels, near-silent and clipped frame counts, sample rate, channel count, and the input device — flagging if the mic was (near-)silent, clipping, or the input route changed (e.g. Bluetooth) mid-capture. Writes to the Event log alongside any VAD diagnostics. Turn off when not debugging.

Tune how speech is detected, how on-device Whisper decodes it, and how replies are spoken. Includes plain-language hints for fixing “it never hears me” and “it cuts me off mid-sentence”. (Diagnostic logging lives in Voice Debugging.)

Everything microphone/voice related in one place: turn on detector logging (Energy, WebRTC, Silero) and microphone Audio Health before reporting a voice bug, and toggle the chime that plays once your speech is transcribed.
Everything to do with the microphone, voice detection, and transcription. Turn the logging switches on before reporting a voice problem, then reproduce it and open the Event log.

Defaults match the app’s long-standing behaviour — you only need this screen when voice misbehaves on your device. Changes apply from the next turn. Settings marked on-device only do not affect Google voice input or cloud Whisper.

How the app decides you are speaking when using on-device Whisper hands-free. Rule of thumb: “it never hears me” or “it cuts me off mid-sentence” → lower the minimum speech energy or turn the energy gate off; “noise keeps starting turns” → raise it, or raise the minimum speech duration.

Speech must also be louder than the gate, which blocks fans/AC that the WebRTC detector mistakes for voice. If the Event log says “speech was heard but stayed below the energy gate”, turn this off or lower the minimum below. (Applies to the WebRTC method; the Energy method is itself a gate.)
Loudness (RMS) a moment of audio needs to count as speech. Default 600. A quiet voice or distant mic can sit at 200–400 — check voiceRms in the Event log and set this below it.
How many times louder than the room’s background noise speech must be. Default 2.5.
Upper limit of the adaptive gate, so a loud first moment can’t raise the bar above your own voice. Default 1400.
Detected speech must last this long before a turn starts. 0 ms = the first speech sound opens the turn. Raise it so a cough or door slam doesn’t start one.

Speech must cross the full gate to start, but then only has to stay above the exit level below — so the quieter words of your sentence still count as speech instead of silence. Built for rooms whose loudness keeps changing; the usual fix for being cut off mid-sentence. Default on.

While you are speaking, audio only needs to stay above this percentage of the gate. Lower it if you still get cut off mid-sentence; raise it if background noise keeps turns alive after you stop. Default 50%.
After speech, dips up to this long still count as speech — bridges breaths and soft syllables entirely below the gate. Note it effectively adds to the pause time before your turn ends. 0 ms = off.

Silero method only: how confident the neural detector must be that a moment is speech. Lower it to catch quiet or distant speech; raise it if the TV or other voices keep starting turns. The energy-gate settings above don’t apply to Silero — it tells speech from noise by itself, which is the point. Default 50%.
How the on-device Whisper model turns your recorded audio into text.
Candidate sentences kept alive during beam search. Higher = slightly better, slower. Default 5.
0 = deterministic (recommended). Raise slightly only if transcripts get stuck repeating a phrase.
Discourages empty transcriptions at the start of decoding. Default on.
Force the whole clip into one segment. Can help short commands; leave off for normal speech.
Optional text that primes the decoder with names, jargon and spellings you want recognised correctly (e.g. “Phosphor, lorebook, Silero”).
Let each clip’s decoding see the text of earlier clips. Can improve continuity across turns; can also propagate a mistake. Default off.
Remove non-speech annotations like [Music] and (applause) before the text is used. Default on.
Write every transcription’s exact parameters and timing to the Event log.
Device (Google) text-to-speech only — the OpenAI voice is generated by the server and ignores these.
The Silero detector couldn’t load on this device. Energy detection will be used instead.

With any of these on, every hands-free decision (mic opened/closed and why, readback, failures, stop reasons) is written to the Event log, plus detailed per-frame detector state to logcat. This is what to turn on before reporting a voice bug.
View, search, edit, approve, or remove saved and pending memories.
Analyze conversation history and review pending memories.
Simple memory notes triggered invisibly by keywords for your companion.
Set memory defaults, models, backups, and review limits.
Use AI to analyze conversations for possible memories. Found memories will be set to pending in the memory browser.
Conversations will be batched due to size.
Memory Archivist needs a model before it can run.
Memory extraction failed. No memories were created from this run.
Archivist could not reach the selected AI service. Check your connection or try again later.
Archivist could not access the selected AI service. Check the endpoint settings, API key, or model access.
Archivist hit a usage limit before memories could be created. Try again later or choose fewer conversations.
Archivist returned a response the app could not read. No memories were saved from this run.
Archivist found possible memories, but the app could not save them. No unsaved memories were added.
Memory extraction was interrupted before it could finish. No memories were created from this run.
Memory extraction failed for an unknown reason. No memories were created from this run.
Memory extraction finished with some skipped conversations. Some memories were created, but a few conversations could not be processed.
Some conversations were skipped because Archivist could not reach the selected AI service.
Some conversations were skipped because the selected AI service rejected access. Check endpoint settings, API key, or model access.
Archivist hit a usage limit before all conversations could be processed. Saved memories were kept.
Some conversations returned responses the app could not read. Saved memories from the rest of the run were kept.
Archivist found possible memories for some conversations, but the app could not save those items. Other saved memories were kept.
The run was interrupted before all conversations could be processed. Saved memories were kept.
Some conversations could not be processed for an unknown reason. Saved memories from the rest of the run were kept.
No eligible conversations were found for this run.
Archivist finished the run, but no new memories were added.
Archivist did not find anything new to save.
Archivist found only memories that already exist.
Memory extraction was interrupted before it could finish.
Saved memories were kept. Some conversations may not have been processed.
No memories were created from this run.
This run created memories that no longer exist because they were deleted after extraction.
Accept Memory and Link to Lore Card?
Long-term companion memory: status, starter seed, backups (experimental)
The memory store hasn\'t been created yet. Load the starter template, import a backup, or create companions from your personas to set it up.
Store integrity: FAILED — %1$s. Restore from a backup export rather than continuing on a corrupt store.
Worlds: %1$d · User personas: %2$d · Roleplay characters: %3$d · Proposals: %4$d
Personas linked to companions: not yet
The memory store hasn\'t been set up yet.
The selected file couldn\'t be read.
Memory store check failed — open Memory settings in Characters for details.
Created %1$d companion record(s) from your personas.
Use lore books in this chat
An on-device embedding model lets memories be found by meaning, not just exact words. Download one variant that fits your phone. This is optional — without it, memory still works by keyword.
No embedding model installed — search uses keywords only.
Index up to date (%1$d memories embedded).
Index needs rebuilding (model changed or new memories).
Couldn\'t build the index — the model may not have loaded. Search falls back to keywords.
Write what the memory system is doing to the Event log. Off by default; turn on only when investigating a memory problem.

Write one line per on-device transcription to the Performance Log: how long the recording was, how long the model took to load, and how long it took to transcribe — plus a snapshot of memory use. Off by default; turn on to find out why Whisper is suddenly slow.

Write the app\'s memory use to the Performance Log about once a minute (and whenever the system asks the app to free memory). Off by default; leave it on across a long session to spot a memory leak — a steadily rising figure is the tell-tale sign.
Install an embedding model in Advanced Memory Settings before switching to the full memory system.
No saved API endpoints yet — add one in API Endpoints first.
Model rules (user-written handling rules for this model):

Be mindful of longer rules as they take up more context space and are sent every turn, which may negatively affect smaller model performance. These count toward token usage, but caching may help with the cost.
Allows custom rules to be sent to specific AI models based on their string ID, not provider. Rules may be assigned to multiple AIs.
When on, model rules apply to any chat whose model matches. You can still turn them off for a single chat.
≈ %2$d characters sent for %1$s — a lot; smaller models may struggle
Use a family name like \"glm-5\" to cover every snapshot, or a full model id for just one.
Enter a model id string. A family name like \"glm-5\" matches every snapshot; the provider prefix is ignored.
%1$d characters — long rules use more of the model\'s memory every turn
Delete the tag \"%1$s\"? The rules keep their text; they just lose this tag.
Memory unavailable this turn — continuing without it
Lore books were UNAVAILABLE this turn (see the Event log)
No active lore books to search — check the persona\'s linked books and the Quick Settings checklist
View, add and edit everything the memory system stores.
A title and content are required.
Still loading — try again in a moment.
Likes, dislikes, style needs, response preferences.
Something currently true but expected to change.
Applies when its topic comes up — for always-on rules, write them on the card.
This will delete all your memories. It cannot be undone. Are you sure?
The backup file could not be written, so nothing was deleted. Your memories are untouched. You can try again, or run the reset without a backup by unchecking the backup option.
Choose how memory works in chats, roleplay, backups, and memory review.
Turn memory on by default for new chats. You can still change this per chat.
Let the active companion\'s approved memories be eligible during roleplay. Off keeps companion memories out of roleplay unless another rule allows them.
Find possible memories in finished conversations, then review them in Pending before saving.
Limit how many memory drafts Memory Assistant can create from each conversation.
Allow card-relevant roleplay recommended memories to be automatically appended to appropriate system locations?

Warning: turning this off could cause campaign relevant information to not line up with roleplay related information cards, causing information to be out of date. Only approved information will be applied to cards. You will have a chance to specify card to add data to. Smaller models may struggle more with accurately classifying proper memory card location.
If auto-suggest is turned off you will still be able to manually assign memories to cards.
Tune extraction temperature, importance, and prompt behavior.
Choose how much memory support the app uses.
Lore Books: Uses trigger-based lore notes.
Full: Uses the full memory system.
Choose which saved AI endpoint analyzes history and drafts memory items.
Model name used by Memory Assistant.
Save a rotating local backup once a day.
Restore memories from an exported JSON backup.
Save a JSON backup you can store or move to another device.
Delete memory content. Offer to export a backup first.
Diagnostics, indexing, model files, and repair tools.
Tune how Memory Assistant analyzes conversation history and creates pending memory drafts. Most users should keep the defaults.
Controls how literal or creative the AI is when analyzing conversations. Lower values are stricter; higher values may find more but can be less reliable.
Only create memory drafts at or above this importance level.
Instructs AI how to analyze conversation history.
Technical tools for memory diagnostics, indexing, model files, and repair.
“%1$s” will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
Protected memories are injected together with handling notes so the model treats them with care. One handling note per line.
e.g. Follow the user\'s lead; never assume how they feel about it
Always-load memories are included every turn, not just when relevant.
No companions yet — enable the full memory engine to create them.
A title and something to remember are both required.
Choose a companion, or turn off companion scoping.
No companions yet. Companions are created automatically from your personas — add a persona, or enable the full memory engine to link them.
This companion is a draft. A draft companion\'s memories never reach conversations until you approve it.
A companion\'s name is owned by its persona. Rename the persona to rename the companion.

Full: keeps this companion\'s own relationship history and global memory. Global only: a throwaway companion that keeps no relationship history, only shared facts. None: bypass the memory system entirely for this companion.
This removes %1$s from the memory system. Its persona/character card is not affected.
Appearance, voice and manner handed to the model for this presentation — the same person, same memories, just described differently.
A name and a presentation are both required.
Traits, appearance, voice — you can also list abilities or spells here for now; there isn\'t a separate field for those yet.
No arc recorded yet. The Archivist fills this in as the story unfolds — it isn\'t editable here.
A name and a description are both required.
You can keep memories linked to \"%1$s\" (they\'ll stay in the store, unlinked from any character) or delete them together with the character.
Cities, cultures and lore are just world‑scoped memories written in prose — open “World memories” to add them.
A name and a premise are required.
Archiving hides the world from the active lists — its links and memories stay, and it can be restored any time. Deleting removes the world for good.
This permanently deletes the world and its memories. This can’t be undone.
Keep memories that also belong to a character
Archiving hides the campaign from the active lists — its links and memories stay, and it can be restored any time. Deleting removes it; the world and characters are left untouched either way.
This deletes the campaign. Choose whether its campaign‑scoped memories go with it.
Included every time this card is active. Large amounts of text may affect model performance.
Used only when it matches the current conversation.
It\'s highly suggested to move non-critical information to the Retrieved When Relevant area.
Save the card first to add entries.
No party members in the roster yet — add one there first.
Tags connect and help organize shared concepts. They can be used to view a page with all information from a single tag shared within roleplay areas.
This will create a permanent history note on the campaign card.
Also update the Active Scene (sent to the AI every turn)
User characters are linked to campaigns and cannot be changed once assigned.
Every roleplay tag in one place — tap one to see everything it connects.
This is linked to: %1$s.\n\nYou can archive it instead — links stay and it just leaves the active lists.
Keep the memories linked to \"%1$s\" (they stay in the store, unlinked) or delete them together with it.
NPCs who travel with the party — one card each, linked into campaigns.
How you present yourself to the model.
Settings your roleplays take place in.
Everything your companions remember — memories, companions, personas and more.
Worlds, campaigns and the characters you play.
The app could not open your encrypted chat storage. Your chats have not been deleted. To protect them, creating and saving chats is paused until storage is available again.
The app could not read this chat. Its encrypted data was preserved and will not be overwritten.
The app cannot create a complete chat backup while encrypted chat storage is unavailable. Your existing backups have not been deleted.
This image is no longer available or could not be opened. Please try a new image.
Upload an image to add it to the gallery.
Images assigned to profiles will appear here.
Saved images that are no longer assigned will appear here.
This removes the image from Profile Images. It cannot be restored unless you upload it again.
These images are not currently assigned to any profiles. They cannot be restored unless you upload them again.
This permanently removes every unused image currently shown. Images assigned to profiles will not be deleted.
Some images were not deleted because they are now in use.
Are you sure you want to delete this?

It's currently in use by:
%1$s

If you delete this, it will change to the default image.
Not enough free space on device to save image. Please try again after making space.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Profile image gallery and associated settings can be found here.
Browse, reuse, and manage saved images.
Sets the shape of the profile images.
Image used when none has been specified.
Used when the active My Persona or Roleplay Character has no image.
This chat is currently using %1$s\'s picture. The avatar below is used when no Companion picture is available.
